message.content:
@startuml
title Melihat Surat BKD

actor AdministratorBKD
participant "Dashboard_V" as DashboardView <<Boundary>>
participant "SuratBKD_V" as SuratBkdView <<Boundary>>
control Admin_C <<Control>>
control BKD_C <<Control>>
entity SuratDisposisi_E <<Entity>>

Admin_C ->> DashboardView : 1 load->view()
activate DashboardView
deactivate Admin_C
DashboardView --> AdministratorBKD : 2 Halaman Dashboard
AdministratorBKD -[dashed]> DashboardView : 3 klik menu Surat BKD
DashboardView -> BKD_C : 4 index()
activate BKD_C
BKD_C -> SuratDisposisi_E : 5 
activate SuratDisposisi_E
SuratDisposisi_E --x BKD_C : 6 
deactivate SuratDisposisi_E
BKD_C -> SuratBkdView : 7 load->view()
activate SuratBkdView
deactivate BKD_C
SuratBkdView --> AdministratorBKD : 8 Halaman Surat BKD
@enduml
